title: None
text: None Defines a component interface with no component implementation. The interface is internally visible to Uniface but without an implementation, it cannot be used. When you compile a signature with no implementation (Uniface, operating system, or foreign), only an interface signature is generated. An implementation signature is also required for a complete component signature. Component signatures with no implementation can serve as placeholders until an implementation is defined.
